content.full_text:
April 7, 1992

F P P C
Fifth & "J" Streets
Sacramento, California 95814

TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN:

The Interment Association of California and the California Mortuary Alliance wish to co-sponsor a Political Action Committee which will be named:

California Interment & Mortuary Political Action Committee
or
California Mortuary and Cemetery Political Action Committee.

Please advise as to the propriety of these names.

Sincerely,

William P. Conway, Jr.
Executive Vice President

WPCjr/ba
